transcript: Hey guys, it's your girl Kyra. We did it. Thank you so much. We made it to half a million subscribers. I couldn't have done it without you guys. Thank you so much for your love and support. Hey, let go of me! That was so good! Do you think they bought it? Of course! Did you see the comments? No, I had my mask on. What'd they say? I'll show you later. I'm gonna get so many subscribers from this! Yeah, you are! We should celebrate. Yeah, let's do it. Do you have any leftover cake in the fridge? Yeah, should be. Awesome. I'll be right back. Jackson? Jackson? Jackson, are you okay? There you are. Why are you sitting on the floor? Come on. Stop messing around. Jackson. Jackson! Who are you? How did you get in here? Get away from me. Get away from me. Why are you doing this? Like I said, you shouldn't lie to your fans. Uh, uh, uh...
